name: Lethal Layers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a food processor, combine the butter and dark brown sugar with the metal blade until crumbly. This can also be done using two knives or a pastry cutter.
3. Gradually add the all-purpose flour until the mixture forms a crumbly dough.
4. Press the dough into a 9-inch by 13-inch pan that has been greased with butter.
5. Bake for 10 minutes, then remove from the oven and allow to cool.
6. When the crust is cool, spread the pecan halves evenly over the surface.
7. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs with dark brown sugar until thick.
8. Add vanilla extract to the egg mixture.
9. Combine salt and baking powder in a 1/4 cup measure; fill the rest of the measure with flour.
10. Stir the dry ingredients into the egg mixture.
11. Pour the batter over the cooled crust, then sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over the top.
12. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes or until the center is baked through. Allow to cool before cutting into 32 pieces.
